derived.causal_summary: Non-active rows dominate search results because read exclusion is channel-inconsistent: 7,340 `tier='deprecated'` snapshot rows still surface at 0.85 score via lexical channels, and 11,086 zarchive rows (33% of the corpus, including 272 critical and 4,278 important) rank as active because `isarchived=0` on every row, `includeArchived` is hardcoded false, and `archived` is a phantom tier absent from VALIDTIERS (report §1 live-state table, ledger L5)
